docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,682.71 FILED BY GOTTLIEB, JASON STORSETER, JANE AS TO DEFENDANT OCEAN AVE. VETERINARY HOSPITAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-18-1994, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAR-02-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $589.00 FILED BY OCEAN AVE. VETERINARY HOSPITAL AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GOTTLIEB, JASON STORSETER, JANE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOTTLIEB, JASON STORSETER, JANE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OCEAN AVE. VETERINARY HOSPITAL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GOTTLIEB, JASON STORSETER, JANE DISMISSED BY DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
